definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="500" y="227"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_send_chat"><value name="text"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">---L币命令帮助（管理员）---</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="actbar"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">FALSE</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_send_chat"><value name="text"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">将某人扣除余额（/lcpunish <哪个玩家> <扣除多少钱>）</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="actbar"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">FALSE</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_send_chat"><value name="text"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">增加某人的钱数（/lcadd <玩家> <钱数>）</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="actbar"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">FALSE</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_send_chat"><value name="text"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">查看某人的钱数（/lcsee <玩家>）</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="actbar"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">FALSE</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
